mnemonics.title: RPC Process Steps
mnemonics.content: Call Marshal Send Receive Execute Return Unmarshal (CMSRERU) - Client Makes Stub, Remote Execution Returns Unpacked

mnemonics.title: RPC Semantics
mnemonics.content: MALE - Maybe, At-least-once, At-most-once, Exactly-once (in order of reliability)

mnemonics.title: Stub Functions
mnemonics.content: Client: Marshal & Send, Server: Receive & Unmarshal (MRSU - My Remote Server Understands)

mnemonics.title: RPC Components
mnemonics.content: Cats Sleep Soundly - Client, Stub, Server (helps remember Client-Stub-Server architecture)
